Year: The year the team meetings were facilitated
Facilitator: The person who facilitated the team meetings
Total_Meetings: Total number of team meetings facilitated in the year
Performance_Reviews: Percentage of meetings about performance reviews
Process_Updates: Percentage of meetings about process updates
Training_Sessions: Percentage of meetings about training sessions
Team_Building: Percentage of meetings about team building
Strategy_Discussions: Percentage of meetings about strategy discussions
